tu.prop: 詩經·小雅·南有嘉魚之什·007.1
Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 湛湛露斯，匪陽不晞。厭厭夜飲，不醉無歸。 湛湛露斯，在彼豐草。厭厭夜飲，在宗載考。 湛湛露斯，在彼杞棘。顯允君子，莫不令德。 其桐其椅，其實離離。豈弟君子，莫不令儀。

Heavy lies the dew; Nothing but the sun can dry it. Happily and long into the night we drink; — Till all are drunk, there is no retiring.
Heavy lies the dew, On that luxuriant grass. Happily and long into the night we drink; — In the honoured apartment we complete our carousal.
Heavy lies the dew, On those willows and jujube trees. Every one of excellent virtue.
From the tlung and the e Their fruit hangs down. Happy and self-possessed are my noble guests, — Every one of them of excellent deportment.
